datasets.name: d9c29308
queryLines:
-- DS-01 Executive KPI Summary
SELECT
  total_databases,
  total_schemas,
  total_tables,
  total_columns,
  ROUND(avg_completeness_pct / 100, 3) AS metadata_completeness_pct,
  ROUND((100 - avg_dq_invalid_pct) / 100, 3) AS data_quality_pct,
  pii_columns,
  critical_columns
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.kpi_summary;

datasets.name: 020b575c
queryLines:
-- DS-02 Certification Level Distribution
SELECT 'Certified' AS certification_level, certified_columns AS column_count
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.kpi_summary

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Documented', documented_columns
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.kpi_summary

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Registered', registered_columns
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.kpi_summary

UNION ALL

SELECT 'None', unclassified_columns
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.kpi_summary;

datasets.name: 6ec2cc2f
queryLines:
-- DS-03 Table governance scores
SELECT
  schema_name,
  table_name,
  ROUND(table_governance_score, 1)   AS governance_score,
  ROUND(avg_documentation_score, 1)  AS documentation_score,
  ROUND(avg_quality_score, 1)        AS quality_score,
  column_count,
  pii_column_count,
  critical_column_count,
  data_steward
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.table_governance
WHERE schema_name = 'gold'   
ORDER BY governance_score DESC;

datasets.name: 6d142f8f
queryLines:
-- DS-04 Governance gaps
SELECT
  database_name,
  schema_name,
  table_name,
  column_id,
  column_name,
  NULLIF(data_steward, 'nan')              AS data_steward,
  NULLIF(security_classification, 'nan')   AS security_classification,
  achieved_cert_level,
  ROUND(completeness_pct, 1)               AS completeness_pct,
  ROUND(dq_invalid_pct, 2)                 AS dq_invalid_pct,
  gap_reason
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.governance_gaps
WHERE schema_name = 'gold'
ORDER BY completeness_pct ASC;

datasets.name: 6741d733
queryLines:
-- DS-05 PII Coverage
SELECT
  total_columns,
  pii_columns,
  critical_columns,
  ROUND(pii_columns * 1.0 / total_columns, 3) AS pii_coverage_pct,
  ROUND(critical_columns * 1.0 / total_columns, 3) AS cde_coverage_pct
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.kpi_summary;

datasets.name: 3060c6a7
queryLines:
--DS-06 Pipeline Quality
SELECT
  dq_pass_rows,
  dq_failed_rows,
  pii_consistent_rows,
  pii_inconsistent_rows
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.dlt_summary;

datasets.name: 6e4e594f
queryLines:
-- DS-07 Structural Consistency 
SELECT
  database_name,
  schema_name,
  table_name,
  column_count,
  standard_column_count,
  lower_bound,
  upper_bound,
  structural_status,
  is_outlier,
  corrective_action
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.structural_consistency
WHERE schema_name = 'gold'
ORDER BY is_outlier DESC, table_name;

datasets.name: f98c42f3
queryLines:
-- DS-08 Domain Summary
SELECT
  domain,
  column_count,
  table_count,
  ROUND(avg_governance_score, 1) AS avg_governance_score,
  certified_columns,
  documented_columns,
  certified_pct
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.domain_summary
WHERE domain != 'Unassigned'
AND domain != 'nan'
ORDER BY avg_governance_score DESC;

datasets.name: bd70deeb
queryLines:
-- DS-09 Structural Summary KPI (single counter row)
SELECT
  total_tables,
  standard_column_count,
  avg_columns_per_table,
  compliant_tables,
  outlier_tables,
  CONCAT(CAST(structural_consistency_pct AS STRING), '%') 
  AS structural_consistency_pct
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.structural_summary;

datasets.name: 5f9b4404
queryLines:
-- DS-10 PII vs Non-PII Columns
SELECT
  'PII Columns' AS pii_type,
  pii_columns AS column_count
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.kpi_summary

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'Non-PII Columns' AS pii_type,
  total_columns - pii_columns AS column_count
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.kpi_summary;

datasets.name: 8c61f78f
queryLines:
--DS-11 DQ passed/failed rows
SELECT
  'Passed Rows' AS dq_status,
  dq_pass_rows AS row_count
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.dlt_summary

UNION ALL

SELECT
  'Failed Rows' AS dq_status,
  dq_failed_rows AS row_count
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.dlt_summary;

datasets.name: cdd8bf9f
queryLines:
-- DS-12 Gaps per Table
SELECT
  table_name,
  COUNT(*) AS gap_column_count,
  ROUND(AVG(completeness_pct), 1) AS avg_completeness
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.governance_gaps
WHERE schema_name = 'gold'
GROUP BY table_name
ORDER BY gap_column_count DESC;

datasets.name: 53a31a28
queryLines:
-- DS-04 Governance gaps
SELECT
  database_name,
  schema_name,
  table_name,
  column_id,
  column_name,
  NULLIF(data_steward, 'nan')              AS data_steward,
  NULLIF(security_classification, 'nan')   AS security_classification,
  achieved_cert_level,
  ROUND(completeness_pct, 1)               AS completeness_pct,
  ROUND(dq_invalid_pct, 2)                 AS dq_invalid_pct,
  gap_reason
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.governance_gaps
WHERE schema_name = 'gold'
ORDER BY completeness_pct ASC;

datasets.name: b1cf4262
queryLines:
-- DS-12 Gaps per Table
SELECT
  table_name,
  COUNT(*) AS gap_column_count,
  ROUND(AVG(completeness_pct), 1) AS avg_completeness
FROM dbx_metadata_governance_dev.gold.governance_gaps
WHERE schema_name = 'gold'
GROUP BY table_name
ORDER BY gap_column_count DESC;

frame.description: Shows the number of governance gaps per table. Higher values indicate tables requiring more remediation.
frame.title: Governance Gaps by Table
